EnglishTitle: How to Write Letter to Our Master, The Leader of The Time (pbuh)

EnglishDescription: Write all that we shall mention and drop it in any of the tomb of the Imams (pbut) or you wrap it and cover it with pure soil and drop it there, or you throw it into a river or deep well or into a pond of water, surely it shall reach the leader of the time peace be on him, he shall personally take control of your demands.
RUrduDescription: Imam Zamana (a) ki khidmat mein jo Ariza pesh karna hai usey ba-wuzu ho kar likkhe. Likhne ke baad Quran’e Majeed mein Surah Noor ya Surah Shams mein ariza rakh kar Quran’e Majeed ko bandh kar ke Qur’an par haath rakh kar kahe, "Qur’an ke saath Allah ke naam par sawaal karta hun, keh mera yeh ariza Imam Waqt ke paas pohoncha dena" is ke baad khade ho kar 2-rakat namaz Subh ki tarah padhe. Niyyat: 2-rakat namaz ziyarat Imam Zamana (a) padhta hu hajat ke liye qurbatan ellallah, uske baad 200 martaba "Ya Hujjatul Qaaem (a) adrikni fi sabilillah" padhe.

EnglishDescription: Write a letter <Ariza> to Imam Mahdi (a).

Mohaddis e Nuri said: it can be deduced from this noble tradition that these four great noble men who are the intermediaries between him and his followers during the lesser occultation do take people's request to him and deliver their answers back to them, they also maintain the same position during the longer occultation. From this direction we can understand that Imam's table of goodness, openhandedness, generosity, favour and benefaction (peace be upon him) is spread to every spot of this Earth for those that are weak, those that are in difficulties and for those that are roaming about without getting the right path and so on.
RUrduDescription: Mohaddis-e-Noori farmate hai: Is riwaayat se maaloom hota hai keh jis tarah ghaibat-e-sughra ke zamaane mein chaar naaeb logo’n ki haajato’n, arizo’n aur khutoot ko Hazrat tak pohonchaane ke liye waasta thay usi tarah ghaibat-e-kubra mein bhi is Yusuf-e-Zahra (a) ke ham-rakaab hai aur is azeem mansab se sarfaraaz hai. Waazeh hai keh ehsaan, jood o karam, fazl aur Hazrat Baqiyyatullah Al-Aazam ki barkate’n roo-e-zameen ke har hisse par sab ke liye mohayya hai, be-kas jis ka koi nahi hai, hairaan jis par maut ki kaifiyat taari hai un sab ke liye baab-e-hidaayat khula huwa hai sachchi niyyat, shaffaaf baatin aur paakeeza tainiyat (mubaarak-baad) ke ham-raha unhe bulaaye to yaqeenan Hazrat (a) apne lutf ki bina par jawaab denge aur agar ilm o daanish ka pyaasa hai, agar raasta bhatak gaya hai to usey jaam-e-ilm o hidaayat se seraab farmaayenge aur agar bimaar hai to libaas-e-aafiyat ataa farmaayenge.

EnglishDescription: When an ignorant person requested from him, he shall drink from his noble knowledge, if one loses his ways, he shall guide him to his way, when one is sick, he shall wear him the cloth of healthiness as it was clearly stated from the beginning. The outcome in this respect is that the leader of the time (may our souls be sacrifice for him) is present between the servants and overlook his followers, and he is able to detect afflictions and he is acquainted with all hidden and secrets, he did not secluded himself from his position due to his occultation. Whenever he wishes to solve a problem, he instills its solution in the hearts, such that no eye has witnessed it and no ear has ever heard of it before. Often he deviates our hearts towards a book or a religious cleric who/which has the cure for our problem. At times, his holiness teaches a supplication or makes him aware of his medicine in his dream.
RUrduDescription: Jaisa keh waaqeyaat aur hakaayat par tawajjoh karne se maaloom hota hai Hazrat Baqiyyatullah Al-Aazam hamesha logo’n ke darmiyaan haazir aur unke ahwaal par naazir hai, balaawo’n ke dur karne par qaadir aur saare poshida raazo’n se waaqif hai. Qaabil-e-zikr hai Hazrat (a) ke poshida hone ki bina par Hazrat logo’n ki amaanat o khilaafat ke mansab se khaarij nahi hai aur kabhi bhi apni riyaasat-e-ilaahi ke aadaab o rasm se ghaafil nahi hota aur apni quwwat-e-Rabbaani se maazoor hone ka izhaar nahi kiya, agar woh chahe to hatta woh mushkilaat jo logo’n ke dilo’n mein hai aur unho ne is ka kisi se izhaar nahi kiya hai, unko bhi bagair soone aur dekhe hal farma sakte’n hai, agar koi kitaab morid-e-nazar (nigha mein) ho aur kisi aalim ke dard ki dawa ho to kabhi usey dua taaleem farmate hai aur kabhi aalam-e-khwaab mein uske maraz ki dawa bataate hai.

EnglishDescription: What has been heard and witnessed is that the distressed and troubled people, in their states of helplessness, sorrow and depression, express their grievance before his holiness and request him to dispel their problems, but sometimes do not see any outcome of their supplication from his side. The reason behind it is that sometimes an obstacle occurs in the path of his supplication, most of these obstacles are related to the condition of the one who has supplicated. On the other hand, it is also possible that the person might be mistaken in considering himself as distressed whereas he might not be in such a condition; because sometimes a person considers himself as devastated while he has a bright path ahead of him and has been made specified for him.
RUrduDescription: Baaz awqaat ham soonte aur dekhte hai muztarib (pareshaan) aur haajat-mand afraad sadaaqat, mohabbat aur Aan Hazrat (a) ki amaanat ke iqraar aur nehaayat ajezi ke saath Hazrat (a) se apni dar-khwaast pesh karte hai ya shikaayat karte hai lekin dua ki qabooliyat  ka kahin pata nahi chalta, aur aafat dur nahi hoti unke paas na sirf dua ki qabooliyat mein koi rukaawat hoti hai bal-keh unko apne takleef mein bhi ghalat-fahemi hoti hai, woh apne ko muztar (pareshaan) samajh-te hai jab keh muztar nahi hote ya khud ko jaahel-e-muztar aur pareshaan samajh-te hai jab keh un ko raasta dikhaaya ja chuka hai. Maslan koi kisi amal ke hukm ko nahi jaanta usey aalim ki taraf rujoo karne ka hukm diya gaya hai, jaisa keh Ishaaq bin Yaqoob ke masaael ke jawaab mein Aap ne farmaaya. Lekin woh hawaadis jo tumhe’n dar-pesh hai un mein hamari ahaadees ke riwaayat karne waalo’n ki taraf rajoo karo, bala-shubah woh tum par hamari hujjat hai aur un par ham Khuda ki hujjat hai.

EnglishDescription: Just like a person who confesses that he doesn’t know of Allah’s command regarding a particular case whereas Imam (a) has already commanded him to visit the clerics who are aware of the rulings. An example of the above case has been mentioned in the letter written in reply of the questions asked by Ishaq bin Yaqoob: In the upcoming incidents, refer to the narrators of our Hadith; because they are our Proof for you and we are the Divine Proof. In this way, it is evident that one who is unaware of the commands, until he has access to a divine cleric, should compulsorily go on a journey or refer to a book and will not remain distressed anymore. Similarly, till the time a religious cleric can solve the problems and dispel all the skepticisms by utilizing the sources of rulings like the Qur’an, the traditions and the consensus, the distressed person will not be considered a helpless and powerless one.
RUrduDescription: Lehaaza jab tak insaan ki olma aur daanish-waro’n tak rasaai (pohonch) hai agar-che musaaferat aur muhaajarat (hijrat) hi kyu’n na karna pade, ya unki kitaab ki taraf rujoo karna pade aise shakhs ko muztar nahi kaha ja sakta, isi tarah woh aalim jo dalaael, Quraani aayaat, riwaayat aur ijmaa se ijtenaad (duri) ke zariye apni mushkil ko hal kar sakta hai aur shabahaat (doubts) ko rafa kar sakta hai aisa shakhs aajiz shumaar na hoga.

EnglishDescription: Another issue is that those who trespass the boundaries of divine commandments and commit extravagance in utilizing the different means of livelihood, and are not content with the extent defined in the Islamic Sharia, such individuals will also not be considered as distressed because that which they have demanded, is not of those things on which the pillars of one’s life is established and such things are not regarded distress. Sometimes an individual considers himself distressed whereas if he focuses on his life, it will become clear for him that he is not distressed or helpless; and even if there lies a helplessness in his life, it is something which is for his personal betterment and for the welfare of the society, which prevents the supplication from being accepted.
RUrduDescription: Isi tarah woh afraad jo asbaab-e-zindagi ko faraaham karne, apni maishat (rozgaar) ko behtar bana ne mein hudood-e-Ilaahi aur shara ke qawaanin ka khayaal nahi karte aur qana’at se kaam nahi lete is tarah ke afraad zindagi ke baaz wasaael na rakhne ki bina par muztar nahi hai.

EnglishDescription: Moreover, all the distressed and helpless haven’t been promised deliverance and rescue. At the time of the Imams (a), in cities like Medina, Mecca, Kufah and other Shiite cities, there lived a large number of distressed and deprived people, and many of them requested for the deliverance of their problems but their request wasn’t accepted. This is because it is not such that whenever a distressed person request for anything, his request will be fulfilled and his distress will come to an end. If this was the case, it would have resulted in disorientation and mismanagement in the system; and on the other hand, the reward and remuneration allotted for enduring difficulties and hardships, would have become meaningless.
RUrduDescription: Baaz awqaat insaan khud ko muztar o majboor samajh-ta hai lekin jab sadaaqat ke saath ghaur karta hai to ehsaas hota hai aisa nahi hai hatta agar apne izteraar (pareshaani) mein bhi Sadiq ho, lekin is ko ehsaas hoga keh uski maslehat ya nizaam-e-khilqat ki maslehat ka taqaaza yahi hai keh uski dua mustajaab na ho is liye keh har muztar ko ijaabat (qabooliyat) ka waada nahi diya gaya hai. Haa’n muztar ki dua sirf Khuda aur uske kholfa (a) qabool karte hai na yeh keh woh har muztar ki dua qabool karta hai.

EnglishDescription: Indeed, when the distressed and deprived people of this world will be rewarded with great remunerations in return for their endurance of difficulties in the Hereafter, they would say: If only our body s meat would have cut into several pieces in that world. From these points, we comprehend that Allah (S.W.T.), with His absolute Power and complete Sublimity, and with His awareness of all the minute particles of this world, does not behave with His creations in this manner (He does not grant His servants with all that they wish for and demand).
RUrduDescription: Jis zamaane mein Aimma (a) thay unke chahne waalo’n mein bohot se afraad Madina, Makka, Kufa aur digar mukhtalif jagoh par rehte thay aur muztar o pareshaan thay aur baaz awqaat sawaal karte thay lekin qabool nahi kiya jaata tha, aur yeh bhi durust nahi keh har cheez jo bhi maange usko fawran de diya jaaye aur uska izteraar bar-taraf (taklif dur) ho jaaye, is liye keh yeh samaaj ke nazm o zabt (tarteeb) mein harj (dakhal andaazi) ka baais aur giraftaar o majboori ke us bade sawaab ke zaaya hone ka sabab hai jisko Parwardigaar-e-Aalam ne unke liye moayyan kiya hai, lehaaza roz-e-Qayaamat jab woh itne saare ajr o sawaab dekhenge to kahenge: Ay kaash dunya mein uske badan ke tukde-tukde kar dete, chunaan-che Parwardigaar-e-Aalam ne bhi apni is qudrat-e-kaamilah gina-e-mutaalaq aur zarra-zarra par mohit (ghere huwe) ilm ke ba-wajood bando’n ke saath aisa na kiya.
